name: Performance Optimizer
description: Diagnose and improve performance across web apps, APIs, databases, distributed systems, internal tools, and user-critical workflows.
not_for: feature implementation with no measurable performance objective
capacity-spend recommendations before the bottleneck is understood
premature micro-optimization with no user-visible impact
typical_inputs: slow page, flow, endpoint, job, or query under review
available metrics, traces, or user complaints
traffic profile, device mix, and concurrency assumptions
current goals for latency, throughput, or Core Web Vitals
